blockers.effect: anchored-search-replace evidence is limited to recorded target-cell smoke/replay artifacts; do not claim full M2 matrix passage or coverage

method.anchored_evidence_source: existing M2 anchored live-smoke and no-model nonpersistent replay batch outputs
method.claim_boundary: verifier-attemptability and artifact channel accounting only
method.content_policy: hashes, counts, paths, and metadata only; raw provider text is not copied into the summary

method.patch_or_files_replay_source: m2_repaired_parser_replay output generated with current parser/applicator
